idea-plugin.name: SVGO
idea-plugin.description:
SVGO is a lightweight IntelliJ plugin that optimizes SVG files using the powerful SVGO engine.

Features

  • One-Click Optimization - Quickly optimize SVG files via right-click menu
  • 42 Optimization Options - Customizable optimization strategies
  • Safe Processing - Preserves SVG structure and visual quality
  • Smart Filtering - Only shows on SVG files
  • Progress Indicator - Real-time feedback during optimization
  • Auto-Save - Automatically saves optimized results

How to Use

  1. Right-click on an SVG file
  2. Select SVGO → Run to optimize
  3. Or select SVGO → Configuration to customize options

Perfect for web developers and designers working with SVG assets!
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.6 - 2026.05.08

  • ✨ Added full i18n support (Chinese & English)
  • 🎯 Grouped menu items under SVGO submenu
  • 🚀 Performance improvements with engine reuse (2.5-4x faster)
  • 📊 Added progress indicator for optimization process
  • 🎨 Using official SVGO-style icon
  • 🐛 Fixed various runtime issues

1.0.0 - Initial Release

  • Integrated SVGO optimization engine
  • 42 optimization options
  • Right-click context menu support
  • Customizable configuration dialog
